question.text: SEBI was established as a statutory body in which year, and when did the provisions of the SEBI Act come into effect?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SEBI was established as a non-statutory body on April 12, 1988, and became a statutory body in 1992. The provisions of the SEBI Act, 1992 (15 of 1992) came into effect on January 30, 1992. **The Trap:** The date April 12, 1988 is when SEBI was set up as a non-statutory body, not when it became statutory. Candidates often confuse these two dates. **Cross-Exam Context:** This is a fundamental fact tested across multiple NISM certifications. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Remember: 1988 = non-statutory, 1992 = statutory with the Act coming into force on January 30, 1992.
